message: Tenant MultiCloud VM instance erplogindemo1 provisioned successfully

_schema_description.node: Host machine details where the provisioner runs

outputs.public_ip: Public IPv4 of the provisioned resource
outputs.instance_id: Cloud provider instance identifier (e.g. i-xxxx for AWS)
outputs.ssh_username: Default SSH login user (ubuntu, root, ec2-user)
outputs.key_pair_name: Name of the SSH key pair used for access
outputs.private_key_ssh: SSH private key (managed via Vault, never exposed in frontend)

_schema_description.username: Platform username of the workspace owner
_schema_description.session_id: Unique UUID for this cloud operation session
_schema_description.state_path: Full Consul/S3 path to the Terraform state file
_schema_description.resource_type: Type: vm | docker | kubernetes | kubernetes-cluster | database | storage
_schema_description.cloud_provider: Provider: aws | azure | gcp | digitalocean | linode | hetzner | vultr | scaleway | valtunox
